content.en:
Impacting the Ninth Realm?

Ye Tian hurriedly asked, "Purple Yun Realm Lord, if you want to impact the Ninth Realm, what do I need to do?"

"I don't need you to do anything for the time being, you better break through to the eighth realm as soon as possible!" said the main Dao of the Purple Yun Realm.

Then.

Ye Tian said truthfully: "Purple Yun Realm Lord, I don't want to impact the Eighth Realm for the time being. "

The Purple Yun Realm Lord quickly thought of something, "If you want to use the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions to attack the eighth realm, this is too difficult, even if I do my best to help you, I can't help you comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions." The rules of the seventh realm of comprehension dimension are not as easy as the rules of the eighth realm of comprehension dimension, and if you want to comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions in the seventh realm, I am afraid that only those nine forces can help you do it. "

"I want to give it a try!"

Ye Tian didn't say much, he didn't want to expose it.

After all, he and the Purple Yun Realm Lord were only cooperating in the "Zero One Zero" system, not in a too close relationship, so there was no need to say everything.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was separated from the Purple Yun Realm Lord, and she went to find a place to impact the Ninth Realm.

As for where to break through, he was not informed.

When the Purple Yun Realm Lord successfully breaks through, then it will inevitably expose the Ten Pyloric Gates, but if you want to destroy the Ten Pyloric Gates, you will definitely not be able to do it.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord's idea was not to destroy the Ten Pyloric Gates, that couldn't be done, she just wanted to kill the Poison Dragon Realm Lord and his lineage.

"The Purple Yun Realm Lord should be sure to break through to the ninth realm, and I also have to comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions as soon as possible so that I can impact the eighth realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Time flies.

Hundreds of domain yuan years had passed, and at this time, Ye Tian had already comprehended the rules of the two hundred and ninety-nine dimensions.

this day.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord contacted Ye Tian.

When he saw the Purple Yun Realm Lord again, the other party's breath made him tremble.

The Ninth Realm!

The Purple Yun Realm Lord has undoubtedly broken through!

"Congratulations to the Purple Yun Realm Lord for breaking through to the Ninth Realm!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord nodded slightly, and then looked at Ye Tian curiously, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I have broken through to the ninth realm, and I can't deduce any of your information, how did you do it?"

In fact, when he came out, he was a little puzzled, but it was not surprising that Ye Tian had practiced some kind of secret technique of concealment and deduction.

But now, she is already in the ninth realm!

"I've cultivated the Misty Eye Soul Technique to the highest level!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"You've actually cultivated the Misty Eye Soul Technique to the highest level!!!!" The Purple Yun Realm Lord was really shocked.

No wonder, she couldn't deduce Ye Tian's traces.

She wanted to ask Ye Tian how she did it, but when she thought that the two sides were just a cooperative relationship, Ye Tian was not his subordinate.

She even suspected that Ye Tian was in the extradimensional realm with a special clone, otherwise why did she dare to directly comprehend the dimensional rules at the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, Ye Tian at that time didn't know the existence of Yuanxia's mother liquor at all!

Thinking about it again, maybe Ye Tian has always been a clone, but she can't spy on it, and now she can't detect Ye Tian's traces.

Of course, she doesn't care what the truth is.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, since you can avoid the prying eyes of the Ninth Realm, I need you to help me do something. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

"What's the matter?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Draw out the Poison Dragon Realm Master!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

"Draw out the Poison Dragon Realm Lord?" Ye Tian was taken aback, "Ziyun Realm Lord, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord is the ninth realm, a wisp of breath can kill me, if you draw him out, I will definitely die!"

"No, you just need to kill his descendants. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said, "At present, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord has been staying at the headquarters of the Ten Heclaves, and I can't break into there, otherwise I will definitely die." But as long as you kill the descendants of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord will inevitably come out of the Ten Helicus Gate Headquarters, and I will take the opportunity to attack him at that time, and you don't need to meet the Poison Dragon Realm Lord. "

"Yes, but what good do I have. "

Ye Tian asked.

"The medium-dimensional star weapon, the True Dragon Lance, is refined from the fragments of the True Dragon Star, which can increase your combat power. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

"Thank you, Purple Yun Realm Master!"

Ye Tian smiled all over his face, just by making a small deal, he could get a medium-dimensional star weapon, and this deal was very cost-effective.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian discussed the specific plan with the Purple Yun Realm Lord, and after deciding on it, he went to the Poison Dragon Lake in the twelfth dimension.

There are a lot of poisonous dragons living here, all of them are descendants of the lord of the poisonous dragon realm, but not all of them, only a part....

There are still some descendants of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord living in the thirteenth dimension, but there are several poisonous dragons of the Eighth Realm sitting there, and Ye Tian naturally can't do it if he wants to destroy it.

But there is only the seventh realm here in the Poison Dragon Lake, and there is no poisonous dragon in the eighth realm.

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord is the Ninth Realm, unless it is the existence of the Ninth Realm to deal with the Poison Dragon Realm Lord, where would the Eighth Realm dare to attack the Poison Dragon Lake.

Besides, if the Ninth Realm really made a move, it would be useless to send the Eighth Realm.

Wow!!!!

Ye Tian descended on the Poison Dragon Lake in the twelfth dimension, sensed it, and found that there were many poisonous dragons here.

There are from the sixth realm to the seventh realm, and there are even some poisonous dragons from the fourth realm and the fifth realm, because the poisonous dragon realm lord has transformed here, so that these poisonous dragons will not be suppressed by the twelfth dimension, and they can practice here with peace of mind.

Ye Tian directly broke into the Poison Dragon Lake and shot directly.

"Taichu Sword Domain, kill!"

The primordial sword domain descended, directly killing pieces of poisonous dragons, even the poisonous dragons of the seventh realm were killed in seconds, and only a few poisonous dragons who stayed in the formation survived.

These formations are arranged by the Lord of the Poison Dragon Realm, which can withstand the attacks of the Eighth Realm, so that they can withstand the attacks of the Primal Sword Domain.

However, Ye Tian continued to attack, vowing to tear these formations apart.

Soon, one formation after another was breached.

The poisonous dragons hiding in the formation immediately appealed to their poisonous dragon ancestors for help.

Ten pylorics.

Inside a palace, a 3.2 incomparably huge poisonous dragon opened its eyes, and immediately its eyes became angry.

"Kill my descendants, find death!"

His body turned into a human form, instantly tearing through the void and heading to the twelfth dimension.

Just as he was about to descend on the twelfth dimension, an attack came, spanning many dimensions, and the terrifying attack made his expression change drastically.

"Heavenly Poison Domain!"

"Ten Nether Domains!"

"Ten Thousand Gu Domain!"

One after another Perfection Realm's dimensional domain bodies erupted, trying to block this blow.

Bang!!!!

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord was shattered from his defenses, and a large amount of Poison Dragon's blood flowed out.

But.

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord was still not seriously injured, only slightly injured.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, it's you, I didn't expect you to break through to the ninth realm!"

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord looked directly at the Purple Yun Realm Lord in the distance, and said coldly.
